<script setup lang="ts">
import { DataTable, Button } from "elements";
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";

import { Order, OrderStatus } from "./types";
import { orders } from "./data";

const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  shipped: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

const columns: Column<Order>[] = [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    isSortable: false,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono text-sm" }, `#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${statusClasses[status]}`,
        },
        statusLabels[status],
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        { variant: "ghost", size: "sm", onClick: () => props.onView(row.original) },
        () => "View"
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        { variant: "destructive", size: "sm", onClick: () => props.onCancel(row.original) },
        () => "Cancel"
      ),
    ],
  },
];
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"
    :data="orders"
    :config="{ filter: true, filterModel: 'customer' }"
  />
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { DataTable, Button } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import type { Column } from "elements";
import type { Order, OrderStatus } from "./types";
import { orders } from "./data";

defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  shipped: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

const columns: Column<Order>[] = [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    isSortable: false,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const id = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono text-gray-900" }, `#ORD-${id}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${statusClasses[status]}`,
        },
        statusLabels[status],
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const count = row.getValue("items") as number;
      return h("span", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, count);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => {
            props.onView(row.original);
          },
        },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => {
            props.onCancel(row.original);
          },
        },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];

const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"
    :data="orders"
    :config="{ filter: true, filterModel: 'customer' }"
  />
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { h } from "vue";
import { DataTable, Button } from "elements";
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { Order, OrderStatus } from "./types";
import { orders } from "./data";

interface Props {
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}

const props = defineProps<Props>();

const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

const columns: Column<Order>[] = [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    isSortable: false,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono text-sm" }, `#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    isSortable: false,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${statusClasses[status]}`,
        },
        statusLabels[status],
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    isSortable: false,
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => props.onView(row.original),
        },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => props.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"
    :data="orders"
    :config="{ filter: true, filterModel: 'customer' }"
  />
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { h } from "vue";
import { Button } from "elements";
import { DataTable } from "elements";
import type { Column } from "elements";
import type { Order, OrderStatus } from "./types";
import { orders } from "./data";

const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

// Status Maps
const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
} as unknown as Record<OrderStatus, string>;

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
} as unknown as Record<OrderStatus, string>;

// Currency Formatter
const currencyFormatter = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
  style: "currency",
  currency: "USD",
});

// Date Formatter
const dateFormatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
  dateStyle: "medium",
});

// Columns Definition
const columns: Column<Order>[] = [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const value = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#ORD-${value}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${statusClasses[status]}`,
        },
        statusLabels[status],
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = currencyFormatter.format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = dateFormatter.format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: () => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => props.onView(row.original),
        },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => props.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"
    :data="orders"
    :config="{ filter: true, filterModel: 'customer' }"
  />
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { DataTable } from "elements";
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import { Button } from "elements";
import type { Order, OrderStatus } from "./types";
import { orders } from "./data";

const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
  refunded: "Refunded",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
  refunded: "bg-gray-100 text-gray-800",
};

const columns: Column<Order>[] = [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class:
            "inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium " +
            statusClasses[status],
        },
        statusLabels[status],
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        { variant: "ghost", size: "sm", onClick: () => props.onView(row.original) },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => props.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable :columns="columns" :data="orders" />
</template>

import { DataTable, Button } from "elements";
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import type { Order, OrderStatus } from "./types";
import { orders } from "./data";

const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;

<script setup lang="ts">
import { DataTable, Button } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { Order, OrderStatus } from "./types";
import { orders } from "./data";

defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

const columns: Column<Order>[] = [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h(
        "span",
        { class: "font-mono text-sm text-gray-700" },
        `#ORD-${orderId}`
      );
    },
  },
  { id: "customer", label: "Customer", isSortable: true },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${statusClasses[status]}`,
        },
        statusLabels[status]
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const count = row.getValue("items") as number;
      return h("div", {}, count);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => props.onView(row.original),
        },
        () => "View"
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => props.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        () => "Cancel"
      ),
    ],
  },
];

const config = {
  filter: true,
  filterModel: "customer",
};
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"
    :data="orders"
    :config="config"
  />
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { DataTable } from "elements";
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { Button } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";

import { Order, OrderStatus } from "./types";
import { orders } from "./data";

defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

// Status lookup maps
const statusLabels: Record<string, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<string, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  shipped: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

const columns: Column<Order>[] = [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    isSortable: false,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    isSortable: false,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      const label = statusLabels[status] || "Unknown";
      const classes = statusClasses[status] || "bg-gray-100 text-gray-800";
      return h(
        "span",
        { class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${classes}` },
        label,
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => props.onView(row.original),
        },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => props.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];

const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"
    :data="orders"
    :config="{ filter: true, filterModel: 'customer' }"
  />
</template>
